title: SANDF wins sport day
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Department of Correctional Services hosted an interdepartmental sports day on 26 March where various government departments were represented.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Department of Correctional Services hosted an interdepartmental sports day on 26 March where various government departments were represented."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This initiative was taken to enhance the relationships and the well-being of all."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The stakeholders came out representing and being able to showcase their products.","html":"The stakeholders came out representing and being able to showcase their products."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All departments competed in the different sporting codes that were available on that day and were awarded with trophies and medals for their participation. The good spirit amongst everyone was amazing.","html":"All departments competed in the different sporting codes that were available on that day and were awarded with trophies and medals for their participation. The good spirit amongst everyone was amazing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Interdepartmental results","html":"Interdepartmental results "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Rugby1.
